description:
## What to build

Add reference-only upstream source checkouts for TauRPC and Effect under `docs/research/infra/` so implementation agents can inspect untranspiled source while still consuming both libraries through normal package-manager dependencies.

This is not traditional vendoring. These directories are research material only and must not become runtime application dependencies.

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] TauRPC source is available under `docs/research/infra/taurpc/` for reference.
- [ ] Effect source is available under `docs/research/infra/effect/` for reference.
- [ ] Adjacent documentation records how the source checkouts were obtained and clarifies that application code installs the libraries via pnpm.
- [ ] No application code imports from the reference-source directories.
- [ ] The added source/reference material is separated from functional app diffs.

## Triage

ready-for-agent
title: Add TauRPC and Effect reference source checkouts
